summary: Defines the no-mock incident replay E2E harness that joins real temporary Beads and git workspaces with fixture-captured Agent Mail, RCH, incident replay, proof-memory, operator-work, extension firewall, and smoothness-SLO failure evidence.

must_requirements.description: The harness must exercise healthy incident replay, Agent Mail corrupt soft-lock fallback, saturated RCH proof refresh, duplicate-work risk, dirty-worktree denial, stale proof-memory refresh, extension resource firewall failure, and smoothness SLO failure.
The harness must use real temporary Beads and git workspaces where safe, and fixture-captured degraded Agent Mail and RCH inputs where live mutation would be unsafe.
Each scenario result must emit a JSONL event with command provenance, exact evidence paths, source paths, a recommended action, verdict, details, and redaction status.
The harness must be operator evidence only and cannot authorize release, benchmark, capacity, drop-in, Agent Mail, RCH, Beads, git, file deletion, or live mutation claims.

claim_boundaries: This contract authorizes no-mock E2E operator evidence only.

It does not authorize live Agent Mail writes, live RCH launches, Beads mutation outside retained temp workspaces, file deletion, git mutation outside retained temp workspaces, release performance claims, capacity claims, benchmark claims, or strict drop-in claims.
Live Beads, Agent Mail, RCH, git, validation, and source artifacts remain authoritative before an operator acts.
